name: SwarmOrchestrator
description: Python-based local multi-agent orchestrator. Coordinates specialized agents through a file-backed blackboard (swarm-blackboard.md), enforces HMAC-gated AuthGuardian permissions, tracks per-agent token budgets, and writes a local audit log. All execution is local — no external network calls from the bundled Python scripts. A companion Node.js MCP server (network-ai-server) is available separately on npm (npm install -g network-ai) for IDE/MCP integration; it is not bundled here and does not run automatically.
author: Network-AI Community

install.description: This skill is instruction-only for the Python runtime. All Python scripts are bundled in scripts/. No code is downloaded during install. The optional Node.js MCP server is a separate package (see below) and is not required to use this skill.

python.note: All scripts run locally only. No external network calls.

optional_node_server.description: Separate optional component — NOT part of this skill bundle. For MCP/IDE integration only.
optional_node_server.note: This npm package contains the Node.js TypeScript server. It is NOT fetched automatically by this skill. Users who want MCP integration must install it manually.

delegate_task.description: Delegate a task to a specialized sub-agent within the swarm

targetAgent.description: The identifier of the target agent to receive the task

taskPayload.description: The task context, instructions, and any required data

priority.description: Task priority level for queue ordering

requiresAuth.description: Whether this task requires AuthGuardian permission grant

query_swarm_state.description: Query the current state of the agent swarm, including active tasks, blackboard contents, and agent availability

scope.description: The scope of state information to retrieve

agentFilter.description: Optional list of agent IDs to filter results

spawn_parallel_agents.description: Spawn multiple sub-agents in parallel for complex task decomposition

tasks.description: Array of parallel tasks to execute

synthesisStrategy.description: How to combine results from parallel agents

request_permission.description: Request permission from AuthGuardian for sensitive operations

resourceType.description: The type of protected resource being requested

update_blackboard.description: Write or update entries on the shared blackboard for cross-agent coordination

adapters.note: No adapter dependencies are required at install time. Import only what you use.

config.maxParallelAgents_default: Infinity (no hard cap since v4.0.0 — set to a positive integer to enforce a limit)

SWARM_TOKEN_SECRET.description: HMAC secret for AuthGuardian permission tokens. If not set, a cryptographically random secret is generated per process start (ephemeral tokens — not persistent across restarts).

SWARM_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: AES-256 encryption key for blackboard at-rest encryption. If not set, a cryptographically random key is generated per process start.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Only used by the optional setup.ts interactive setup wizard and demo examples (07-full-showcase.ts). Not required for the core orchestrator, adapters, MCP server, or any Python scripts.

audit_log.description: Append-only JSONL audit log recording operation metadata (agentId, action, timestamp, outcome). Stays in the local data/ directory. No data is sent externally. Can be disabled with --no-audit flag or audit_log: false in config.
